name: outlook
description: Outlook / Microsoft 365 email channel — poll unread mail, read/reply/mark-read

tools.name: outlook_get_message
tools.description: Read a full email by message ID

tools.name: outlook_get_attachment
tools.description: Download one attachment from an email to the artifacts dir

tools.name: outlook_reply
tools.description: Reply-all on the triggering email thread (whitelist-gated; blocks the whole send if any recipient is not whitelisted)
